'''âz-s-y''' ('''zasaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chargrill|chargrill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chargrill|chargrill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-s-y
|-
! Lemma
| zasaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zasayithi|zasayithi]] || [[word:zasayiji|zasayiji]] || [[word:zasayishi|zasayishi]] || [[word:zasayi|zasayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zasayuthuth|zasayuthuth]] || [[word:zasayujuj|zasayujuj]] || [[word:zasayushush|zasayushush]] || [[word:zasay|zasay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zasayuthu|zasayuthu]] || [[word:zasayuju|zasayuju]] || [[word:zasayushu|zasayushu]] || [[word:zasayu|zasayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zasayufuth|zasayufuth]] || [[word:zasayufuj|zasayufuj]] || [[word:zasayufush|zasayufush]] || [[word:zasayuf|zasayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zasayethe|zasayethe]] || [[word:zasayeje|zasayeje]] || [[word:zasayeshe|zasayeshe]] || [[word:zasaye|zasaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zasayothoth|zasayothoth]] || [[word:zasayojoj|zasayojoj]] || [[word:zasayoshosh|zasayoshosh]] || [[word:zasay|zasay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zasayotho|zasayotho]] || [[word:zasayojo|zasayojo]] || [[word:zasayosho|zasayosho]] || [[word:zasayo|zasayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zasayofoth|zasayofoth]] || [[word:zasayofoj|zasayofoj]] || [[word:zasayofosh|zasayofosh]] || [[word:zasayof|zasayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zasayĂŠthĂŠ|zasayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zasayĂŠjĂŠ|zasayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zasayĂŠshĂŠ|zasayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zasayĂŠ|zasayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zasayathath|zasayathath]] || [[word:zasayajaj|zasayajaj]] || [[word:zasayashash|zasayashash]] || [[word:zasay|zasay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zasayatha|zasayatha]] || [[word:zasayaja|zasayaja]] || [[word:zasayasha|zasayasha]] || [[word:zasaya|zasaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zasayafath|zasayafath]] || [[word:zasayafaj|zasayafaj]] || [[word:zasayafash|zasayafash]] || [[word:zasayaf|zasayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zasayasha|zasayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozasayasha|gozasayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizasayasha|gokizasayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zasaynĂŒsha|zasaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozasaynknĂŒsha|gozasaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizasaynĂŒsha|gokizasaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zasayshĂ«sha|zasayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozasaynkshĂ«sha|gozasaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizasayshĂ«sha|gokizasayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zasayrosha|zasayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozasaynkrosha|gozasaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizasayrosha|gokizasayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zasaymusha|zasaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozasaynkmusha|gozasaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizasaymusha|gokizasaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zasaysherasha|zasaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozasaynksherasha|gozasaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizasaysherasha|gokizasaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zasayngasha|zasayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozasaynkngasha|gozasaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizasayngasha|gokizasayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zasayasha|zasayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozasaynkyasha|gozasaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizasayasha|gokizasayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zasayamasha|zasayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozasaynkyamasha|gozasaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizasayamasha|gokizasayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zasaynĂŒshĂ«sha|zasaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozasaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozasaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizasaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizasaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zasaynĂŒrosha|zasaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozasaynknĂŒrosha|gozasaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizasaynĂŒrosha|gokizasaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zasaynĂŒmusha|zasaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozasaynknĂŒmusha|gozasaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizasaynĂŒmusha|gokizasaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zasayshĂ«nĂŒsha|zasayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozasaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozasaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizasayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizasayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zasayshĂ«rosha|zasayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozasaynkshĂ«rosha|gozasaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizasayshĂ«rosha|gokizasayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zasayshĂ«musha|zasayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozasaynkshĂ«musha|gozasaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizasayshĂ«musha|gokizasayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zasayronĂŒsha|zasayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozasaynkronĂŒsha|gozasaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizasayronĂŒsha|gokizasayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zasayroshĂ«sha|zasayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozasaynkroshĂ«sha|gozasaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizasayroshĂ«sha|gokizasayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zasayromusha|zasayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozasaynkromusha|gozasaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizasayromusha|gokizasayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zasaymunĂŒsha|zasaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozasaynkmunĂŒsha|gozasaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizasaymunĂŒsha|gokizasaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zasaymushĂ«sha|zasaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozasaynkmushĂ«sha|gozasaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizasaymushĂ«sha|gokizasaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zasaymurosha|zasaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozasaynkmurosha|gozasaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizasaymurosha|gokizasaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zasay|zasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠsĂŠy|zĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozasay|hozasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠsĂŠy|hozĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozasay|hohozasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠsĂŠy|hohozĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzasay|nĂŒzasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠsĂŠy|nĂŒzĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzasay|nĂŒnĂŒzasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠsĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzasay|nĂŻzasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠsĂŠy|nĂŻzĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzasay|nĂŻnĂŻzasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠsĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzasay|luzasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠsĂŠy|luzĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzasay|luluzasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠsĂŠy|luluzĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizasay|lizasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠsĂŠy|lizĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizasay|lilizasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠsĂŠy|lilizĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozasay|kozasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠsĂŠy|kozĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozasay|kokozasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠsĂŠy|kokozĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezasay|kezasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠsĂŠy|kezĂŠsĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezasay|kekezasay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠsĂŠy|kekezĂŠsĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
